ApiKey.dialog_edit_description: Update the name of your API key

ApiKey.rate_limit_hint: Maximum requests per hour for this API key

Billing.title: Billing
Billing.login_required: You need to be logged in to view billing
Billing.pricing_plans_subtitle: Select the perfect plan and enjoy more benefits
Billing.faq_q1: Can I use credits for all models?
Billing.faq_a1: Yes, credits can be used for all AI models on this site, including image and video generation.
Billing.faq_a2: Your credits never expire and remain valid permanently.
Billing.faq_q3: Can I get bulk purchase discounts?
Billing.faq_a3: Large volume users can contact support for better pricing and exclusive services.
Billing.crypto_min_amount_error: Cryptocurrency payment is not available for this plan. Please select a higher plan.

Affiliate.title: Affiliate Program
Affiliate.description: View your referral performance, commission progress, and payout readiness from one page.

banner.title: About current settlement coverage
banner.description: Due to payment channel limits, some order types may be temporarily excluded from affiliate settlement. We will announce expanded coverage as soon as it becomes available.

profile.loadErrorTitle: Unable to load your affiliate status
profile.loadErrorDescription: Application-related actions are hidden until your affiliate profile is loaded successfully.

dashboard.empty: Affiliate data will appear here once it is ready.
dashboard.loadError: Failed to load the affiliate dashboard.
dashboard.demoDescription: This is demo data to help you understand the affiliate page structure and metrics. After you apply and get approved, it will switch to your real data automatically; if you have no commission yet, it will show 0 accurately.

hero.title: Join the affiliate program and turn traffic into recurring revenue
hero.description: Share PoYo with developers, creators, and AI teams. After approval, you can unlock your dedicated referral link and earn commission from qualified orders.

totalEarnings.label: Total Earnings
totalEarnings.hint: Lifetime commission generated by all attributed orders.

pending.label: Pending Settlement
pending.hint: Commission still within the safety review period.

available.label: Available
available.hint: Commission balance that already meets withdrawal requirements.

paid.label: Paid Out
paid.hint: Commission that has already been settled and paid.

link.title: Invite Friends Link
link.descriptionApproved: Share this link with friends to earn rewards.
link.descriptionNotApplied: You have not joined the affiliate program yet. After you apply and get approved, your dedicated referral link will appear here.
link.descriptionPending: Your referral assets and dedicated share link will be generated automatically after approval.
link.descriptionSuspended: Your affiliate access is currently suspended, so your referral link and share copy are temporarily unavailable.
link.descriptionBanned: Your affiliate access is currently banned, so your referral link and share copy are unavailable.
link.applyValue: Submit your application first. After approval, your dedicated referral link will appear here.
link.pendingValue: Awaiting approval. Your dedicated referral link will appear here once your application is approved.
link.suspendedValue: Affiliate access is suspended. Your dedicated referral link is currently unavailable.
link.bannedValue: Affiliate access is banned. Your dedicated referral link is currently unavailable.
link.helper: The referral code can be used in direct messages, communities, or manual entry.
link.codeLockedValue: Your dedicated referral code will appear after approval.
link.shareCopyLockedValue: Copyable share copy will be generated automatically after approval.
link.shareCopyFallback: I have been testing AI products and workflows lately, and PoYo.ai feels pretty useful for quickly trying models ✨ It supports 500+ popular models, including OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Kling, Runway, Sora, Nano Banana, and more, with image, video, music, and multimodal models available through one place; one account and one API reduce the need to register, recharge, and integrate across many platforms, while pay-as-you-go usage is flexible for demos, integrations, and model comparisons. If you are also building AI workflows, you can check it out here: {shareUrl}
link.shareCopyText: I have been testing AI products and workflows lately, and PoYo.ai feels pretty useful for quickly trying models ✨ It supports 500+ popular models, including OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Kling, Runway, Sora, Nano Banana, and more, with image, video, music, and multimodal models available through one place; one account and one API reduce the need to register, recharge, and integrate across many platforms, while pay-as-you-go usage is flexible for demos, integrations, and model comparisons. If you are also building AI workflows, you can check it out here: {shareUrl}
link.lockedToast: Referral links and share copy can be used after approval.
link.lockedToastSuspended: Your affiliate access is currently suspended, so referral assets are temporarily unavailable.
link.lockedToastBanned: Your affiliate access is currently banned, so referral assets are unavailable.

rules.title: Program Rules
rules.description: Review the core settlement and compliance rules before applying to avoid misunderstandings later.

commission.title: 15% commission rate
commission.description: Qualified first-party orders attributed through your dedicated referral link are currently settled at a 15% commission rate.

safetyPeriod.title: 45-day safety period
safetyPeriod.description: Commission first enters a pending state and becomes withdrawable only after the anti-fraud and refund review window is complete.

minimumPayout.title: $100 minimum payout
minimumPayout.description: Once your withdrawable balance reaches the minimum threshold, you can request a payout in the next settlement cycle.

fraudPolicy.title: Anti-fraud protection
fraudPolicy.description: Self-referrals, repeated payment identities, and abnormal traffic may invalidate commission and can lead to rejection or removal in severe cases.

rules.disclaimer: PoYo.ai reserves the final interpretation rights for affiliate program rules, commission calculation, and payout review standards.

not_applied.title: Not Applied
not_applied.description: You have not joined the affiliate program yet.
not_applied.details: Submit your channel information, promotion plan, and contact details so the team can evaluate whether your content scenario is a good fit.

pending.title: Application Under Review
pending.description: Your application has been submitted successfully.
pending.details: Review is usually completed within 1 to 3 business days. Demo data remains visible during review, but referral assets stay locked.

approved.title: Affiliate Access Approved
approved.description: Your affiliate workspace is fully active.
approved.details: You can now use your referral link in content, communities, emails, or onboarding flows and start accumulating commission.

suspended.title: Affiliate access suspended
suspended.description: Your application remains approved, but your affiliate access is currently suspended.
suspended.details: During suspension, new referral bindings and new commission will not continue. Historical orders, commission, and payout records remain visible.

banned.title: Affiliate access banned
banned.description: Your application remains approved, but your affiliate access is currently banned.
banned.details: During the ban, referral links and share copy are unavailable, and new referral bindings or new commission will not continue. Historical records remain visible.

rejected.title: Application Needs More Information
rejected.description: Your last submission did not pass review.
rejected.details: Please provide clearer channel information or a more specific promotion plan, then submit again.
rejected.reasonValue: The current submission lacks enough public channel proof or a specific enough promotion plan.

form.title: Apply to Join the Affiliate Program
form.description: Fill in your promotion channels, account proof, and promotion plan so we can complete the review.
form.accountLinksDescription: Provide URLs for your social media accounts or website.
form.contactDescription: Email or Telegram for quick communication.
form.planDescription: Describe how you plan to promote our product. Recommended length: 100-500 characters.
form.planPlaceholder: Example: I will publish a detailed YouTube review, share highlights on X, and add a comparison article on my blog...
form.notesPlaceholder: Add any information that may help the review.
form.proofDescription: Upload a screenshot proving you own the social account or website, such as a channel dashboard, analytics page, or settings page.
form.validationChannels: Select at least one promotion channel.
form.validationAccountLinks: Add at least one account link.
form.validationAccountLinkInvalid: All account links must be valid http or https URLs.
form.validationProof: Upload a proof screenshot before submitting.
form.validationProofType: Please upload a PNG or JPG screenshot only.
form.validationProofSize: Proof screenshots must be 5MB or smaller.
form.validationPromotionPlan: Enter your promotion plan before submitting.
form.validationContact: Enter your contact information before submitting.
form.validationUploadInProgress: Please wait until the screenshot upload finishes.
form.submitSuccess: Application submitted and is now under review.

invites.title: Invite Activity
invites.description: Track new signups and early conversion quality from your referred users.
invites.emptyDescription: Users who sign up through your referral link will appear here.

orders.title: Commission Orders
orders.description: View attributed orders and how commission moves from pending to withdrawable and finally paid.
orders.emptyDescription: Attributed orders will appear here after referred users complete payment.

withdrawals.title: Withdrawals
withdrawals.description: View withdrawable balance, payout rules, and transfer history in one place.
withdrawals.historyDescription: View payout request records and the processing progress of manual admin transfers.
withdrawals.helper: Commission can be requested for withdrawal only after the safety period ends and the balance reaches the minimum threshold.
withdrawals.emptyDescription: Processing records will appear here after you submit a withdrawal request.

requestDialog.title: Request Withdrawal
requestDialog.description: Choose a withdrawal method and enter the receiving account used for manual admin transfer.
requestDialog.fullAmountNotice: This request will withdraw the full current withdrawable amount: {amount}
requestDialog.manualTransferNote: Withdrawals are reviewed and transferred manually by an admin, not paid automatically.
requestDialog.validationAccount: Please enter the receiving account first.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: These answers cover common questions new affiliate partners ask before and after applying.

commission.question: What is the commission rate?
commission.answer: Qualified orders attributed through your dedicated referral link are currently settled at a 15% commission rate.

payout.question: When can I withdraw commission?
payout.answer: Commission becomes withdrawable after the safety period ends and your available balance reaches the minimum threshold.

fraud.question: What counts as invalid promotion?
fraud.answer: Self-referrals, repeated payment identities, abnormal traffic, or fabricated conversions may invalidate commission.

review.question: How long does application review usually take?
review.answer: Most applications are reviewed within 1 to 3 business days, depending on queue volume and material completeness.

faq.supportDescription: If you are not sure whether your channel is suitable, contact support with a short audience summary first.

login.title: Affiliate Program
login.heading: Please sign in first
login.description: You need to sign in before entering the affiliate workspace.

PromptLibrary.subtitle: Nano Banana Pro
PromptLibrary.title: Prompt Library
PromptLibrary.descriptionSuffix: prompts in one place. Browse cards, search tags, link to sources. Cover is the scene, inspiration at a glance.
PromptLibrary.noMatchingPrompts: No matching prompts. Try different keywords or tags.

pricing.successOnlyNote: Pay only for successful requests. Billed at the end of each request and deducted from your prepaid balance.
pricing.chatSuccessOnlyNote: Token-priced chat requests are billed from actual prompt and completion usage. Pay only for successful requests.

unitsByModel.seedance-2: per second | 480p: 10 cr/s ($0.05, with video input), 20 cr/s ($0.10, text/image-to-video); 720p: 20 cr/s ($0.10, with video input), 40 cr/s ($0.20, text/image-to-video); 1080p: 45 cr/s ($0.225, with video input), 90 cr/s ($0.45, text/image-to-video)
unitsByModel.seedance-2-fast: per second | 480p: 8 cr/s ($0.04, with video input), 14 cr/s ($0.07, text/image-to-video); 720p: 16 cr/s ($0.08, with video input), 28 cr/s ($0.14, text/image-to-video)
unitsByModel.claude-opus-4-7: per 1K input tokens | output: 5 credits ($0.02 / 1K tokens)

model.gptImage2DefaultPrompt: Draw a picture of OpenAI's founder introducing APIDot.ai
model.gptImage2PromptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want to generate...
model.gptImage2ReferenceImagesHelp: JPEG, PNG, or WebP up to 10MB each. Required for gpt-image-2-edit.
model.gptImage2ReferenceRequired: Please upload at least one reference image for gpt-image-2-edit
model.gptImage2JsonReferenceRequired: gpt-image-2-edit requires at least one image_urls entry
model.gptImage2JsonImageUrlsInvalid: input.image_urls must be an array of image URLs
model.gptImage2JsonImageUrlsTextModelUnsupport: input.image_urls is only supported for gpt-image-2-edit
model.gptImage2JsonNUnsupported: input.n is not supported for gpt-image-2
model.playgroundNotice: This Playground is for demo purposes. Data is only valid in the current window and will be cleared on refresh.
model.chatPreviewDescription: Send a message with the same model id used in production. Switch between OpenAI-compatible and Anthropic-native endpoints without changing the rest of the page.
model.chatDraftRequired: Please enter a message before sending.
model.chatNumericInvalid: Temperature, max tokens, and top p must be valid numbers.
model.chatMessagesRequired: JSON configuration must include a non-empty messages array.
model.chatModelInvalid: JSON configuration must use claude-opus-4-7 as the model id.
model.chatEmptyResponse: The model returned an empty response. Please try again.
model.chatSubmitFailed: Failed to send the request. Please try again.
model.chatUpgradeDescription: Claude Opus 4.7 is billed by token usage. Add credits before sending more requests.

market.noModelsFoundDesc: Try adjusting your filters or search query to find what you're looking for.

user.signInHint: Sign in to view your workspace info

claude-opus-4-7.name: claude-opus-4-7
claude-opus-4-7.description: Anthropic's most capable generally available model for frontier coding, long-horizon reasoning, 1M context workflows, and high-resolution vision up to 2576px / 3.75MP.

seedance-2.name: seedance-2
seedance-2.description: ByteDance's Seedance 2 family for cinematic multimodal video generation with native audio-video joint synthesis, multi-shot storytelling, lip-sync across 8+ languages, and director-level control from text, image, video, and audio inputs.

seedance-2-fast.name: seedance-2-fast
seedance-2-fast.description: ByteDance's Seedance 2 family for cinematic multimodal video generation with native audio-video joint synthesis, multi-shot storytelling, lip-sync across 8+ languages, and director-level control from text, image, video, and audio inputs.

gpt-image-2.name: gpt-image-2
gpt-image-2.description: OpenAI's GPT Image 2 text-to-image model for photorealistic visuals, near-perfect text rendering, strong UI fidelity, and prompt-driven marketing, product, and screenshot-style image generation.

gpt-image-2-edit.name: gpt-image-2-edit
gpt-image-2-edit.description: OpenAI's GPT Image 2 single-image editing model for localized, context-aware transformations that preserve composition while updating backgrounds, copy regions, and visual details.

veo-3-1.name: veo-3-1
veo-3-1.description: Google DeepMind's Veo 3.1 family for native-audio video generation with text, reference-image, and frame-guided workflows across Fast, Lite, and Quality variants.

veo3.1-fast.name: veo3.1-fast
veo3.1-fast.description: The fastest Veo 3.1 tier for rapid 8-second iteration with native audio, reference-image control, and lower-latency testing before moving ideas into production.

veo3.1-lite.name: veo3.1-lite
veo3.1-lite.description: The most cost-efficient Veo 3.1 tier for higher-volume 720p, 1080p, and 4K generation while preserving native audio and the same reference-guided workflow.

veo3.1-quality.name: veo3.1-quality
veo3.1-quality.description: The highest-fidelity Veo 3.1 tier for premium cinematic shots, richer detail, stronger polish, and top-end 4K delivery when output quality matters most.
